---
title: "Increasing Large Wildfires in the Eastern United States"
date: "2024-03-28"
description: "This webinar provides an overview of changing large wildfire regimes in the eastern U.S., highlighting increasing wildfire number, size, and total area burned within regions of the southeast. In addition, the presentation will discuss how…"
categories: ["Webinar"]
pub-authors: "Donovan, V. M., Crandall, R. M., Fill, J. M., Ivey, M. A., **Weidig, N. C.** & Wonkka, C. L."
pub-venue: "Southern Fire Exchange"
pub-url: "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vdZSXsaz7c0"
---

::: {.nw-cite-meta}
Donovan, V. M., Crandall, R. M., Fill, J. M., Ivey, M. A., **Weidig, N. C.** & Wonkka, C. L. (2024). *Southern Fire Exchange*.
:::

[Source](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vdZSXsaz7c0){.nw-btn .nw-btn-primary target="_blank"} [BibTeX](cite.bib){.nw-btn .nw-btn-ghost}

## Abstract

This webinar provides an overview of changing large wildfire regimes in the eastern U.S., highlighting increasing wildfire number, size, and total area burned within regions of the southeast. In addition, the presentation will discuss how changing wildfire dynamics impact public wildfire risk in the wildland-urban interface. This presentation will summarize the findings from a recent publication (https://doi.org/10.1029/2023GL107051).
